parameters.content:
## Uptime & SLA Reporter

**Setup:**
1. Create YOUR_SMTP_CREDENTIAL
2. Set UPTIME_EMAIL_TO and SLA targets
3. Feed uptime measurement data from your monitoring system
4. Code nodes compute SLA compliance, downtime duration, breach status — no LLM
5. Approval gate before SLA report is distributed

parameters.subject: =Uptime & SLA Report: {{ $('Format SLA Report').first().json.period.start }} — {{ $('Format SLA Report').first().json.meta.sla_breaches }} breach(es)
